transcript.text:
[Hole in the wall restaurant in Yokji Island]
[I'm here to eat!]
NO!
Why not?
We're not open today
I'm not feeling well
[Never give up!]
[2nd visit] I couldn't eat here because the owner wasn't feeling well
[Can we finally eat here today?]
The doors are open
The lights are off though
[Dialing...]
[Fail!]
[I will eat there once and for all!]
[3rd visit] It's my third time here
Hopefully they are open today

Let's head inside
It's locked!
[In despair]
[4th visit] Will it be open today!?
I hope it is!
Hello?
Hello~?
Are you open today?
Yes
That's a relief
It's my 4th time here
It's been closed every time
I was sitting inside
I just heard the phone ring
What are you trying to eat?
Kimbap (Korean sushi roll) and Ramyun (Instant noodles)

There are 2 items on the menu
Kimbap and Ramyun
Are you a singer? What are you?
I'm not a singer
Then what are you?
Eater. I'm an eater
I film myself eating
[OK Understood]
You look like a singer
Can I order now?
5 ramyun noodles
5!?
You're going to eat all 5?
There's no way
5 Ramyuns and 2 lines of Kimbap please!
How the hell are you going to eat all 5 packs of Ramyun?

I.. I can!
I can only cook 3 ramyuns
How come?!
I only have 3 burners
[Just eat 3!]
[The fire is being a problem]
[Bean Sprout Shin Ramyun Noodles 3,000 Won (~$2.65 USD)
[Hey, that's not Shin Ramyun...]
[Business hours and the menu are all up to the owner]
That's hot
Hot hot hot
Is it hot?
Hot hot hot
HOT
You want eggs?
Yes, please!

It's hot!~
Hot~~
Just eat 3
But I'm hungry
Even if you're starving, you can't eat more than 2 packs!
Excuse me, do you have kimchi?
I don't
There's not a household here that doesn't have kimchi
[I was just messing with you]
Thank you~
A lot of kimchi for me
I made it myself from the yard
Really?
You're going to eat that much kimchi?
Thank you
Bon Appetit!

That's delicious
There are no bean sprouts
Excuse me, where are the bean sprouts!?
I didn't buy them
[NO bean sprouts]
No matter how many times I try it
It doesn't taste like Shin ramyun at all
[How did you know? haha]
It's Ansung Tangmyun (different brand)
[NOT Shin ramyun]
Shin ramyun is too spicy for you!
Oh it's too spicy? I like Ansung Tangmyun too
Very good~
You have to eat non-spicy ramyun
These are called "Bean Sprout Shin Ramyun" But it's none of them
It's still tasty

There are eggs in here instead of bean sprouts
[Time to make 2 lines of Kimbap]
So delicious
[Taking her sweet time]
[Already on her 2nd pot]
[I better hurry up!]
[Hurry hurry!]
Yummy
[To the 3rd pot she goes]
[She's fast]
[Kimbap comes out after she finishes the noodles]
Thank you~
These are huge!
I made them bigger
You ate all 3 ramyun noodles?
Can I please have 3 more?

NO!
I can't?
[Refusal of service]
You will get full after eating all of that
I'm hungry~
How about the Kimbap rolls?
I will eat it
You can't finish it all
There are only a few ingredients in here
That's delicious
Dip it in the soup
Do you only have 3 of these pots?
I have 5
So that means there are 2 more pots in the kitchen
Do you want me to make you 2 more Shin ramyun?
You have Shin ramyun!?

Sure, I can if you want
But can you finish it all?
NO!
2 more Shin ramyun noodles, please
I have to eat these together with the noodles
Stop, stop eating!
Wait!
Excuse me,
Can I have 1 more roll of Kimbap?
Aigooo
How are you going to finish it all!?
You have 2 ramyun noodles here
That lady...
What will she say if I told her I can eat 20 packs of Ramyun noodles?
There's no lady in this world that can eat 5 packs of ramyun noodles
[Over here]

It's here
Thank you!
Thank you~ Is this Shin ramyun?
Yes
The noodles are nicely cooked
That's so good
They are both good
Yummy
I love the soup when it's mixed with the raw egg
Very nice
Excuse me, do you have rice?
[Just eat the Kimbap!]
I'm done selling for today
You're done for today?
There are no more ingredients left
No more ingredients?

I have nothing left
I'm going to rest today We'll open tomorrow
It's hot in here
It's hot right? I'll turn on the fan for you
That's okay
Tasty!
You were hungry
Did you not eat lunch?
[I did.. hehe]
Excuse me, Do you have white rice?
Rice?
Of course I do
Can I please have 1 bowl of rice?
So you can eat it with the soup?
Go get some yourself
Take the pot in and get some rice

Can I? Is that okay?
Thank you
How will you eat it all?
You're scaring me
Yay
Can I take a lot?
Take however much you can eat!
I won't say anything if you can finish it
Just a little
I only took a little bit
That's so good
Excuse me, Can I have some more rice?
Take it
Come here and look at this
She's eating 5 ramyun noodles
For 2 people? That's understandable

Alone!
5 ramyuns alone?
[That's terrifying]
[I'm not a weird person]
I'll stop here with the soup
Sadly, I will go ahead and stop here for today
Thanks everyone~
[Sadly? Does she need more food?]
Excuse me, Do you take bank transfer as payment?
No
You don't?
Do you not have a bank account?
I have a bank account
I will send the money there
Okay
How much is it?

[Calculating...]
Total comes out to 25,000 Won (~$22.12 USD)
Rice
Don't worry about the rice Don't pay for that
There's no need
Thank you
So how much is it total?
Do that bank transfer you're talking about
I sent 30,000 Won (~$26.53 USD)
Why?
Because you let us film here and stuff And I ate a lot
It's sent
So the money is in here now?
Yes, it's in
Where is it?
[It's not written here]

It doesn't say on the paper yet
You will see it when you check later
I sent the money
I will go find you if you didn't
Check later, it will be on this YouTube channel
You can search "Tzuyang"
What's the name? Han Yang?
Tzuyang
Tziyang? Zuyang? Zuhyang?
Is your last name Jeon?
[Shaved ice for dessert]
[There's no sign] [It's called 3-way Sanghwe]
Hello
Hello welcome
Do you sell shaved ice?
1 Mulberry shaved ice

And 1 plum juice, please
Please let me know if you need anything else
This is how dessert is supposed to be done
What is this?
It's like crackers It's yummy
I'll try the mulberry now It's my first time
It tastes good
I don't really like shaved ice that much
I kind of eat the fruit ones, but not the red beans
It's like a very sweet fruit shaved ice
We got the plum from the mountains
Thank you
It's made with the actual plum extract
The mulberry tastes good
Great dessert
A spoonful of mulberries

That's it
[To-go'd one for the restaurant owner]
I brought dessert for you!
Why?
Do you not want it?
I want it!
I already had one It was tasty
Why did you buy one for me?
Enjoy~
[Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
